title: HS2 Phase One Planning Forum: Heritage Subgroup meeting resources March 2016
body: "The HS2 (High Speed Two) Phase One Planning Forum was established in May 2013 in advance of the submission of the HS2 Hybrid Bill. The HS2 Phase One planning forum acts as the primary vehicle for liaison between the HS2 project and local authorities along the HS2 Phase One route between London and the West Midlands on matters of cross boundary and route-wide interest.  During the passage of the High Speed Rail (London - West Midlands) Bill through Parliament, the focus of this particular forum is to discuss route wide principles, standards, practices and processes associated with heritage matters. These presentations help give a visual representation of what was discussed and presented in these meetings.  Invitees to the Heritage Subgroup are representatives from relevant local authorities, Historic England, HS2 Ltd and the Department for Transport.  "
